rebuild_manifest.source_file: oncology\gastric_cancer\免疫一线\checkmate649 中国亚组.pdf

v2_sources.title: First-line nivolumab (NIVO) plus chemotherapy (chemo) vs chemo in patients with advanced gastric cancer/gastroesophageal junction cancer/esophageal adenocarcinoma (GC/GEJC/EAC): CheckMate 649 Chinese subgroup analysis 2-year follow-up
v2_sources.citation: First-line nivolumab (NIVO) plus chemotherapy (chemo) vs chemo in patients with advanced gastric cancer/gastroesophageal junction cancer/esophageal adenocarcinoma (GC/GEJC/EAC): CheckMate 649 Chinese subgroup analysis 2-year follow-up. Annals of Oncology. 2022.

boundary_tags.population_or_model: Chinese patients with advanced gastric cancer (88%), gastroesophageal junction cancer (12%), or esophageal adenocarcinoma; 75% had PD-L1 CPS ≥ 5

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'In patients with PD-L1 CPS ≥ 5, median OS was 15.5 months (95% CI: 11.9-21.1) for NIVO + chemo vs 9.6 months (95% CI: 8.0-12.1) for chemo (HR 0.56, 95% CI 0.38-0.81)', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'In patients with PD-L1 CPS ≥ 5, median OS was 15.5 months (95% CI: 11.9-21.1) for NIVO + chemo vs 9.6 months (95% CI: 8.0-12.1) for chemo (HR 0.56, 95% CI 0.38-0.81)', 'page': 1}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'In all randomized patients, median OS was 14.3 months (95% CI: 11.5-16.5) for NIVO + chemo vs 10.3 months (95% CI: 8.1-12.1) for chemo (HR 0.63, 95% CI 0.46-0.86)', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'In all randomized patients, median OS was 14.3 months (95% CI: 11.5-16.5) for NIVO + chemo vs 10.3 months (95% CI: 8.1-12.1) for chemo (HR 0.63, 95% CI 0.46-0.86)', 'page': 1}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'In patients with PD-L1 CPS ≥ 5, median PFS was 8.5 months (95% CI: 6.0-14.0) for NIVO + chemo vs 4.3 months (95% CI: 4.1-6.5) for chemo (HR 0.51, 95% CI 0.34-0.76)', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'In patients with PD-L1 CPS ≥ 5, median PFS was 8.5 months (95% CI: 6.0-14.0) for NIVO + chemo vs 4.3 months (95% CI: 4.1-6.5) for chemo (HR 0.51, 95% CI 0.34-0.76)', 'page': 1}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'In all randomized patients, median PFS was 8.3 months (95% CI: 6.2-12.4) for NIVO + chemo vs 5.6 months (95% CI: 4.2-6.8) for chemo (HR 0.57, 95% CI 0.41-0.80)', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'In all randomized patients, median PFS was 8.3 months (95% CI: 6.2-12.4) for NIVO + chemo vs 5.6 months (95% CI: 4.2-6.8) for chemo (HR 0.57, 95% CI 0.41-0.80)', 'page': 1}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Objective response rate (ORR) in patients with PD-L1 CPS ≥ 5 was 68% vs 48% and median duration of response (DOR) was 12.5 months vs 6.9 months for NIVO + chemo vs chemo', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Objective response rate (ORR) in patients with PD-L1 CPS ≥ 5 was 68% vs 48% and median duration of response (DOR) was 12.5 months vs 6.9 months for NIVO + chemo vs chemo', 'page': 1}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'ORR in all randomized patients was 66% vs 45% and median DOR was 12.5 months vs 5.6 months for NIVO + chemo vs chemo', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'ORR in all randomized patients was 66% vs 45% and median DOR was 12.5 months vs 5.6 months for NIVO + chemo vs chemo', 'page': 1}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Grade 3/4 treatment-related adverse events (TRAEs) occurred in 66% and 50% of patients with NIVO + chemo vs chemo', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Grade 3/4 treatment-related adverse events (TRAEs) occurred in 66% and 50% of patients with NIVO + chemo vs chemo', 'page': 1}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Any-grade TRAEs leading to discontinuation were observed in 49% and 26% of patients for NIVO + chemo vs chemo', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Any-grade TRAEs leading to discontinuation were observed in 49% and 26% of patients for NIVO + chemo vs chemo', 'page': 1}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Patient population: 88% had gastric cancer, 12% had GEJC, no patients had EAC; 75% had PD-L1 CPS ≥ 5', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Patient population: 88% had gastric cancer, 12% had GEJC, no patients had EAC; 75% had PD-L1 CPS ≥ 5', 'page': 1}
